pplicationNode All Implemented Interfaces: java.lang.Cloneable, Node public class ASTPtFunctionApplicationNode extends ASTPtRootNode This class represents an expression that is the application of a function in the parse tree. The first child of thi

unction in the parse tree. The first child of this node is the child node that represents the function. The function specification may any node that evaluates to a FunctionToken, or a leaf node that refers to the name of a function registered wi

at refers to the name of a function registered with the parser. The remaining children are node representing the arguments of the function. For information on the evaluation of functions, refer to ParseTreeEvaluator.visitFunctionApplicationNode(
